choices.text: WBS contains 100% of project scope. All deliverables; no overlap; sum of children = parent. Activities (Level 5) typically 8-80 hours each.
Longest path through activity network = minimum project duration. Zero total float. Delaying any critical activity delays project. Forward + backward pass calculations identify it.
Crashing (add resources to critical activities - costs more) + Fast-tracking (overlap normally sequential - risk of rework). Update schedule + assess cost vs. risk trade-off.
MS Project (SMB), Primavera P6 (enterprise/complex), Procore (cloud + field). 4D adds BIM; 5D adds cost. All implement CPM.

Last Planner System + Pull Planning (collaborative backward) + PPC tracking (target 80%+) + DOWNTIME waste identification. Big rooms + prefab tactical. Culture change > tools. Best in IPD/repeat-client setups.
